nasb.text: Jephthah judged Israel six years. Then Jephthah the Gileadite died and was buried in one of the cities of Gilead.

esv.text: Jephthah judged Israel six years. Then Jephthah the Gileadite died and was buried in his city in Gilead.

cnv.text: 耶弗他治理以色列人共六年；基列人耶弗他死了以後，埋葬在基列其中的一座城裡。

ccb.text: 耶弗他做以色列的士师六年，死后葬在基列的一座城里。
